creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 164537
SVN patch for games/bsp against svn:ports/head

Removing the BROKEN flag initially revealed that the distfile was once again fetchable. I've since downloaded the distfile in question and uploaded it to my own webserver as a mirror, for a little bit more redundancy. I've included my site as a second entry to MASTER_SITES. I am attaching a single patch to address both of these at once.
